title: Ministerial appointments: February 2025
body: "The King has been pleased to approve the following appointments:    Ashley Dalton MP as a Parliamentary Under-Secretary of State in the Department of Health and Social Care.    The Rt Hon. Douglas Alexander MP jointly as a Minister of State in the Cabinet Office, in addition to his role as Minister of State in the Department for Business and Trade.   Lord Moraes OBE as a Lord in Waiting (Government Whip).   Lord Wilson of Sedgefield as a Lord in Waiting (Government Whip).     Andrew Gwynne MP has left the government.  Lord Cryer has left the government. "
